title: Discord Channel Capability Conformance
objective: Install the Discord channel package through OpenClaw's plugin command path, import the installed message adapter, drive it through a deterministic platform shim, and prove Discord's declared channel atoms plus shared workflow cases without live Discord credentials.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova can install Discord the way users install an external channel package.

phases.title: Install Discord Channel Package
phases.intent: Install Discord through OpenClaw's plugin install path before adapter conformance. Local-build targets use the built external package from the checkout; release targets use the declared package name.

phases.title: Run Discord Deterministic Shim Conformance
phases.intent: Import Discord's installed message adapter, execute declared atom proofs and shared workflow cases through its adapter send methods, and record adapter/platform-mapping evidence without live Discord credentials.
